title: iPSC Karyotyping Protocol
author: Yu Chen
materials: 24 hours after seeding. iPSCs were treated with Colcemid (1:100, Roche, 10295892001) for 12 hours.

steps.title: iPSCs were dissociated with Accutase and...
steps.instruction: iPSCs were dissociated with Accutase and plated at 1x106 cells/well in 6 well plates in StemFlex with 10 μM Y-27632.

steps.title: Treated iPSCs were transferred to NHGRI Cytogenetics Core for karyotyping
steps.instruction: Treated iPSCs were transferred to NHGRI Cytogenetics Core for karyotyping.
